# Figures

All figures used by `Paper.tex`.

## Paper figures (PGF, generated by scripts)

| File | Description | Generated by |
|------|-------------|--------------|
| `error-heatmap-laplace-2d.pgf` | 3-panel error heatmap, Laplace 2D, 9th order derivative | `scripts/plot_recurrence_error.py laplace` |
| `error-heatmap-helmholtz-2d.pgf` | 3-panel error heatmap, Helmholtz 2D, 8th order derivative | `scripts/plot_recurrence_error.py helmholtz` |
| `error-heatmap-biharmonic-2d.pgf` | 3-panel error heatmap, Biharmonic 2D, 8th order derivative | `scripts/plot_recurrence_error.py biharmonic` |
| `error-bestfit-laplace.pgf` | Single recurrence step error vs |x1|/xbar with linear fit | `scripts/plot_bestfit_and_cost.py bestfit` |
| `cost-helmholtz-2d.pgf` | Flop count comparison (recurrence vs no recurrence vs no rotation) | `scripts/plot_cost.py helmholtz` |
| `qbx-convergence.pgf` | QBX boundary evaluation convergence on ellipse | `scripts/plot_qbx.py` |
| `asymptotic-c5.pgf` | Asymptotic behavior of odd-order (c=5) derivatives | `scripts/plot_appendix.py c5` |
| `asymptotic-d6.pgf` | Asymptotic behavior of even-order (d=6) derivatives | `scripts/plot_appendix.py d6` |
